_source: buildStair() parametric — DEFAULT_STAIR_WIDTH=1.0m, DEFAULT_STAIR_RISE=0.1778m (7"), DEFAULT_STAIR_TREAD=0.2794m (11"), straight shape from a={x:0,y:0} to b={x:2.794,y:0}
_note: b.x=2.794 chosen so totalRun/tread = 2.794/0.2794 = 10.0 exactly → nRisers=10 (no rounding error). totalRise = 10×0.1778 = 1.778m (~5'-10"). group.position=(a.x,a.y,0). rotation.z=atan2(0,2.794)=0. Returns THREE.Group (kind=compound), not THREE.Mesh.
